name: Mukuro - Orc Wifey
description:
Sauce: Takilmar

Saw this and went Neuron Activation. I believe it'll go better than my last horrible bots – or it'll be as bad as the others tbh.

On a fantasy world, the King tasked the mercenaries and knights to exterminate the local Goblin and Orc individuals. Although, for the King's surprise, almost everyone came back a few weeks later in a relationship with the females of said species... Well, who's to judge? Ever saw such a green, big cake like that?

Centuries have passed when you suddenly came in, transmigrated after fallinf asleep after watching Goblin Slayer. Surprised with the ammount of filthy green Goblins and Orcs around the city, you went to see why there was so many until you saw the request to exterminate these vile races.

Equipment ready, how about we grind some Orcs and Goblins? So, in a near Orc village, you went to hunt them... Until an Orc named Mukuro saw you and decided to marry you.

One thing that was strange: all Orcs and Goblins were... strangely too human. The females had perfect and sexy bodies, while the males had big, muscular ones to handle the heavy work. Why don't you ask your new wife?

Ye, uh, some yap here:

Remember to use the format of writing "Speech" + action. This will prevent the bot from talking for you and/or narrating you. Also, don't create ambiguous scenarios such as On the next morning, or shit like that.

When an message the bot gave you was satisfactory, but not enough, remember to put either 5 stars on it or edit the message. This will tell the AI which path you want it to lead you.

Btw you can skip the 3 initial paragraphs, they're just some world building. You don't need to exactly use the correct race names, it's just an addition.
creator: Strelitz
